title: Amino Acid Table
steps: Amino Acid Stock % Solvent STER. Storage Final [ ] (μg/ml) μl per 100 mls* 1 Alanine 0.5% (5 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 40 800 2 Arginine HCI 1% (10 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 20 200 3 Asparagine 0.5% (5 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 40 800 4 Aspartic Acid 1% (10 mg/ml) 0.2 N NaOH F RT 100 1000 5 Cysteine 0.5% (5 mg/ml) water F RT/4°C 40 800 6 Glutamine 2% (20 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 40 200 7 Glutamic Acid 1% (10 mg/ml) 0.2 N NaOH F RT 100 1000 8 Glycine 2% (20 mg/ml) water A 4°C 40 200 9 Histidine HCI 1% (10 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 20 200 10 Isoleucine 1% (10 mg/ml) water A 4°C 30 300 11 Leucine 1% (10 mg/ml) water A RT 30 300 12 Lysine HCI 1% (10 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 30 300 13 Methionine 1% (10 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 20 200 14 Phenylalanine 1% (10 mg/ml) water A RT 50 500 15 Proline 2% (20 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 40 200 16 Serine 8% (80 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 400 500 17 Threonine 4% (40 mg/ml) water A RT 200 500 18 Tryptophan 1% (10 mg/ml) 0.1 N HCI F 4°C (It. sens) 20 200 19 Tyrosine 0.2% (2 mg/ml) 0.2 N NaOH F RT(It. sens) 30 1500 20 Valine 3% (3 mg/ml) water A RT/4°C 150 500 * volume (in μl) of stock solution to add to 100 mls of medium to yield indicated final concentration A = Autoclave, F = Filter sterilize, RT = Room temperature DNA Bases Stock % Solvent STER. Storage FINAL [ ] (μg/ml) μl per 100 mls* 1 Adenine Sulfate 0.2% (2 mg/ml) 0.1 N HCI F RT 20 Stp 2 Cytosine 0.5% (5 mg/ml) water A 4°C 40 800 3 Guanine 0.5% (5 mg/ml) 0.1 N HCI F 4°C 40 800 4 Thymus 0.1% (1 mg/ml) water A 4°C 40 4000 5 Uracil 0.2% (2 mg/ml) water A RT 20 1000 6 Uridine 1% (10 mg/ml) water F RT 30 300 * volume (in μl) of stock solution to add to 100 mls of medium to yield indicated final concentration A = Autoclave, F = Filter sterilize, RT = Room temperature
